title: Mobile pet groomer (dogs/cats) $4000-$6000
description:
Role Summary

Pawkit is hiring a full-time Housecall Pet Groomer to join our growing mobile grooming team. This role is for groomers who are confident working independently, enjoy housecall services, and are comfortable travelling between locations daily. You will provide professional grooming services directly in clients’ homes, delivering high-quality, compassionate, and stress-minimised care for pets.

This role is ideal for groomers who value autonomy, professionalism, and working in a premium housecall service environment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Provide professional housecall grooming services for cats and dogs

  • Perform bathing, drying, brushing, trimming, full grooming, and basic styling

  • Handle pets safely and calmly in home environments

  • Drive between locations using company-provided or assigned vehicle (if applicable)

  • Maintain grooming hygiene, equipment cleanliness, and safety standards

  • Follow Pawkit grooming SOPs and service protocols

  • Communicate professionally with pet owners

  • Assess pet behaviour and escalate complex cases appropriately

  • Maintain service documentation and job records

Requirements

  • Certified professional pet groomer

  • Comfortable with daily travel between housecall locations

  • Experience handling cats and dogs

  • Ability to work independently in home environments

  • Calm, patient, and confident animal handling skills

  • Strong hygiene and safety awareness

  • Good communication and professionalism

  • Physically fit for mobile grooming work

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience in housecall or mobile grooming
  • Fear-free or low-stress handling training
  • Valid Singapore Class 3 driving license
  • Experience with senior, anxious, or special-needs pets
  • Multi-species grooming experience (cats/dogs/rabbits)

Work Structure

  • Housecall-based role

  • Route planning and scheduling managed by Pawkit

  • Structured job allocation

  • Operations and logistics support provided

Compensation & Benefits

  • Monthly salary: SGD $4,000 – $6,000 (based on experience and skill level)

  • Performance incentives (where applicable)

  • Stable job flow

Transport & Mobility Support

We support different mobility setups:

  • Have your own vehicle: Petrol allowance provided

  • Have Class 3 driving license but no vehicle: Company vehicle can be provided

  • No license / no vehicle: Transport allowance provided

  • Professional support and training

  • Growth opportunities within Pawkit’s service network

  • Structured operations support

Application

If you are a professional groomer who enjoys 1-1 grooming and are looking for a stable, well-supported housecall grooming role, we would love to hear from you.

Apply via: career@pawkit.sg
